title: CozyMods
description: CozyMods is a modpack by PickleBuzz.
body:
![CozyMods by PickleBuzz](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c527e66627686835844ca90689118b70ce6a7d11.png)
This is the official modpack used by PickleBuzz in both his Forever World and Hardcore series on YouTube.

Designed to enhance immersion and elevate the beauty of Minecraft, this pack focuses on clientside mods that deliver a rich audiovisual experience without altering core gameplay. From dynamic weather to lifelike movement and sound, every detail is crafted to make the world feel more alive.

Key Features:

🎧 Sound Overhaul

Ambient Sounds, Immersive Thunder, Presence Footsteps, Sound Physics Remastered, Sounds
Experience a vibrant soundscape where footsteps echo differently based on the surface, thunder rumbles with intensity, and the world feels acoustically alive.

🎨 Visual Enhancements

Iris Shaders, 3D Skin Layers, Particular, Explosive Enhancement, Particle Rain, Not Enough Animations, Visuality, Fresh Animations, Fresh Moves
From dynamic shaders to expressive player animations and gorgeous particles, these mods transform Minecraft into a visually captivating experience.

🛠️ Quality of Life Improvements

Lithium, Noisium, Mouse Tweaks, and more
These mods boost performance and usability without changing the core mechanics, keeping the gameplay vanilla-friendly and smooth.

Whether you're a longtime fan of the Forever World or just looking to enhance your solo adventures, this modpack is built to make Minecraft feel deeper, richer, and more immersive-without losing the magic of the original game.
